title: eupatorium celendinense
intro: Eupatorium celendinense, also known as White Snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its white, clustered flowers and fuzzy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain. The health benefits of Eupatorium celendinense include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Eupatorium celendinense include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and ease respiratory issues.
